rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0001
rows.name:
FrontierNet found a reading
that seems to be a Life Point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0002
rows.name: It's in Nightglow Forest, west of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0003
rows.name: That's great news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0004
rows.name: Yeah, take a look at this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0005
rows.name: That's Yorupikka Woods, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0005_2
rows.name:
So that's what the Nopon call it.
We call it Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0005_3
rows.name: No sense, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0005_4
rows.name: Which one?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0005_5
rows.name: Moving on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0005_6
rows.name: Y-Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0006
rows.name: According to the Pathfinder report,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0007
rows.name:
no activity from intelligent life forms has been confirmed,
but there seem to be many native creatures there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0008
rows.name: That's strange, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0009
rows.name:
Nopon have visited Yorupikka
Woods for ages, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0010
rows.name:
W-Well, almost no activity from intelligent
life forms has been confirmed, but be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0011
rows.name: Ah! That was a subtle way to put it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0012
rows.name:
You're underestimating
Nopon intelligence, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0013
rows.name: Oh jeez, keep complaining and I'll cook you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0014
rows.name:
Lao's team is apparently near
Nightglow Forest[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0015
rows.name: installing Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0016
rows.name:
They might have some information,
so meet up with them and ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04040100_MSG0017
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]
